events.title: Severe flooding in Vadodara district, Gujarat — industrial estates inundated after record monsoon rainfall
events.why_relevant: Flooded GIDC industrial estates in Vadodara are home to the sole-source plant producing Northwind's food-grade emulsifier blend; the report explicitly mentions production halts at chemical plants.

events.title: Tropical Storm Warning — Tropical Storm Delia approaching the southwest Louisiana coast
events.why_relevant: The warning area covers the Lake Charles petrochemical corridor where Pelican Polymer Films extrudes the packaging film for the granola-bar line; precautionary shutdowns are already underway.
